description: CompositionGrey with multi-coloured stripes, V-neck sweater made of a cotton/nylon blend, has a ribbed neck, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs and hem and branding appliquéd on the left chestFitRegularWash careHand wash separately using a mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron; Do not iron on decorationsEnjoy the chill in this stylish sweater from wrangler. The ribbed V-neck and long sleeves makes this a must have, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling warm and comfortable all day long. Layer this over shirts or tees, jeans and leather slip-ons for a laid back look.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26"
